Langseax of the Wolves  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +5
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 09 2003 at 11:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) your troll sucks... as do you...
Cool Barbarian Sword
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 7:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250871744
274 posts
Perhaps it is because I am an old timer, but this is still one of my Favorite Swords. It has about the same raito as the Axe of the Iron Back, and teh Drakkel Forged ******* Sword. However it is the only sword of this quality with good bonus +5 str and +5 dex. All in all a very nice weapon. I also like the grafic, simple yes but somehow it looks right for a barbarian.
▲ Page top
RE: Cool Barbarian Sword
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2002 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757250072
29 posts
I haven't seen the graphics on the sword... but if you warriors are into 2HS... I would try the babs or the crystalized 2h sword. They both dmg 24 but babs has less delay and 3 sv on something. Dmg bonus for me on babs is 7 and on the crystalized is 14.
Xiaro
40 pally
▲ Page top
RE: Cool Barbarian Sword
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 4:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775566052
117 posts
Crystalized is better because of a bonus for most 40 and over delay 2h weapons.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 09 2001 at 4:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) read the subject becuz he thinks hes all good becuz he has a bridgadine tunic and a ****** sword lmao he also sits there and has no life andl earns the languages like a looser than gets a bridge tunic worth 200pp and a lang sword worth 200 for it and says its worth 3k... friggin moron
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 16 2001 at 1:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Lol, this is hilarious. And you have so much more of a life that all you do is sit around and criticize other people's posts. Not that I'm saying I do, since I'm doing the same thing, but at least I'm not so stupid that I don't even realize it, like you.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 08 2001 at 5:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i would really like to get one of these, Im willing to pay good for it.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 7:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im on Cazic thule and i REALLY need a new sword.If anyone wants to sell me one i'll pay well for it :)
Sweet Deal!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 11:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762392818
2 posts
I was like a LvL 16 Warrior, and I had just learned every language in the game. On Lanys T'vyl at least, it was a very cheap to learn skill as far as money goes (At least for non-humans, and if you play your cards right :) ), and very profitable. Well, I was just wondering around in East Commonlands, selling my skill for different prices for different languages, and this LvL 24 twinked Wood Elf Warrior sends me a tell. He said he wanted to learn everything I knew, with the exception of his normal skill in language. I said to him "Sure, gimme a sec to add up the total" It came out to be about 450pp. That may seem like a high price, but I was pulling people in for way more than that if they offered. Anyway, he told me to meet him in North Freeport cause he had to offload some stuff, and get the cash. Well, I taught him everything til' he was fluent in every language. He stands up and hands me like 150pp. At first I was furious for trusting him in teaching him these languages and getting ripped off. But then I saw a Tunic in the trade window. Then a sword. I thought, oh yay, a banded tunic which I am wearing one of the same type, and a 2HS sword. I inspected the first Item, the tunic, and I saw the stats before the name. Brigandine Tunic. This was great, and it matched perfectly was I allready had on. The sword I figured would just be Bronze or something. But no. It was something I had heard of, and thought it was such item, but had never actually seen it. It's name read Langseax of the Wolves. At the time, including the Platinum, this was a total value of about 1.8K pp. I was exstatic, and wore the Tunic and sold the Sword for about 300pp. This was at the dawn of Kunark, so things were of decent value from the orginal continents still. This is however a sad story. At Lvl 18, I died in Kithicor Forest by a run away gang of undead. I never got that stuff back. Un-twinked at LvL 18 and worth 3K. ( Swear to god, I'm got so lucky on that char.) I tried to teach Language again for the money to replace that stuff. But EQ put in some bug that made it take a ton longer to teach at that time. **** YOU EQ FOR ******** MY PERFECT PLAN!!!

▲ Page top
